parameters-en.Speed: Controls the speed or rate of the phaser. When set to note values, Speed follows the system tempo.
parameters-en.Depth: Controls the depth or intensity of the vibrato effect.
parameters-en.Rise Time: Controls hot long it takes for the vibrato effect to fade in.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the vibrato effect and the dry signal.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
parameters-en.Headroom: Provides up to 12.0 dB of additional headroom. Some pedals' internal signal paths exhibit a bit of grit, especially when placed after a high-gain amp block. Negative values increase the perceived amount of grit; positive values clean things up a bit.
